channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Trend Micro users beware - dangerous Apex One zero-day exploited in the wild
item.description: CISA has already added the flaw to its KEV database.

item.title: Why prompt debt, retrieval debt, and evaluation debt are quietly reshaping enterprise AI risk
item.description: Over the past two decades, technical debt meant outdated architecture, messy code, and poorly maintained documentation. That definition is no longer sufficient in the AI era, where failure modes are more subtle and often non-linear. AI systems are introducing new layers of technical debt that live across prompts, models, and data dependencies — making these layers less visible, harder to measure, and often more dangerous than traditional debt.A crisis hiding in plain sightThe complexities of AI systems and their associated failures have been well documented. A 2025 MIT study found that 95% of ...

item.title: I found 11 surprise Memorial Day Apple deals: Get the M5 MacBook Air for a record price, save $50 on AirPods and iPads
item.description: Looking for the best Memorial Day deals on Apple products? You can score the M5 MacBook Air for $899 and the AirPods Pro 3 for under $200.

item.title: Save up to $600 on mini PCs from Dell, Geekom, GMKtec, and more in Amazon's Memorial Day sale — I've found a ridiculous number of mini PC deals, but you'll need to be super-fast to get them at this price
item.description: From cheap mini PCs for the home office to high-end, upgradeable machines for serious business.

item.title: Avant son départ pour la Planète rouge, ExoMars doit encore passer plusieurs tests cruciaux
item.description: La vie a-t-elle existé sur Mars ? Pour le savoir, le rover Rosalind Franklin et tous les éléments de la mission devront d'abord passer avec succès une batterie de tests draconiens. Les modèles structuraux de la mission ExoMars 2028 sont actuellement en cours de tests chez Thales Alenia Space,...

item.title: IKEA living room trends for summer: playful colors and open storage for a welcoming space that's packed with personality
item.description: This summer, I'm using bold and beautiful color blocking to brighten my living room.

item.title: Hyundai is recalling 421,000 cars over collision‑avoidance software bug
item.description: The NHTSA issues a safety recall on certain Hyundai vehicles equipped with faulty collision software, leading to hundreds of driver reports.

item.title: Cox Media fined after bragging it spied on users through their phones
item.description: An exceptionally weird controversy has come back to haunt Cox Media and a pair of marketing firms, which claimed they were secretly listening to users via phones and smart devices - despite little evidence they actually could. On Thursday the Federal Trade Commission announced that Cox, MindSift, and 1010 Digital Works would pay a total […]

item.title: 'This is a sales tactic': Experts warn ransomware hackers will often lower their prices - with some giving discounts up to 96%
item.description: Ransomware actors use a whole range of different tactics to persuade victims to pay the demands.

item.title: Last call: Save $130 on Bose noise-cancelling headphones for Memorial Day
item.description: Get the Bose QuietComfort noise-cancelling headphones on sale at Amazon for Memorial Day. Save $130 on these Mashable-tested headphones.

item.title: Epic Games reveals a first look at Unreal Engine 6 with a Rocket League makeover
item.description: We still don't have a release date for the new game engine.

item.title: What is the release date for Half Man episode 6 on HBO Max and BBC iPlayer?
item.description: A messy end awaits us in Richard Gadd's most uncomfortable TV show yet. But when does Half Man episode 6 drop on HBO Max and BBC iPlayer?

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A37 vs Samsung Galaxy A36 : comment choisir le meilleur smartphone Samsung Galaxy A ?
item.description: Peu de changements cette année sur le milieu de gamme Samsung… si ce n'est un prix qui part en flèche ! Vaut-il mieux craquer pour le nouveau Galaxy A37, ou son prédécesseur le A36 fait-il encore parfaitement l'affaire ? Réponse dans notre nouveau versus !
